text.title: Feature Flag Rollout Runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether feature-flag-rollout-runbook applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this rollout touch ≥1% of live traffic AND a feature flag platform is available?

branch.conclusion: Single-cohort flag is fine; still log kill switch.

example.description: When `yes AND first_user_facing_release` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
